data.title: Write CI skeleton hashFiles() structural tests (RED)
data.description:
## Testing Mode
RED

## Description
Create tests/skills/test-architect-foundation-ci-skeleton.sh with test functions verifying the CI skeleton template contract in SKILL.md:

1. test_python_hashfiles_conditional — Assert SKILL.md CI skeleton section contains a Python block with hashFiles() conditional gated on requirements.txt or pyproject.toml, root-relative path (no leading slash/dot)
2. test_node_hashfiles_conditional — Assert Node block with hashFiles() gated on package-lock.json or yarn.lock
3. test_ruby_hashfiles_conditional — Assert Ruby block with hashFiles() gated on Gemfile.lock or Gemfile
4. test_blocks_structurally_isolated — Assert each language block is a self-contained conditional (not interleaved with other blocks)
5. test_paths_root_relative — Assert all hashFiles() paths have no leading ./ or /

Tests FAIL (RED) on current codebase because SKILL.md has no CI skeleton section with hashFiles() conditionals.

## Files to Modify
- tests/skills/test-architect-foundation-ci-skeleton.sh (CREATE)
- .test-index (EDIT — add entry and RED markers)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Test file exists and is executable
  Verify: test -x $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/skills/test-architect-foundation-ci-skeleton.sh
- [ ] Test contains at least 5 test functions
  Verify: grep -c 'test_' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/skills/test-architect-foundation-ci-skeleton.sh | awk '{exit ($1 < 5)}'
- [ ] Test FAILS on current codebase
  Verify: ! bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/skills/test-architect-foundation-ci-skeleton.sh
- [ ] .test-index updated with RED markers
  Verify: grep 'architect-foundation' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.test-index | grep -q 'test-architect-foundation-ci-skeleton'
